didn't make the cut.

with that nasty <Color=red>gloom<Color=white> again.

contact with it.

Glad I ate that <Color=red>yellow plant stuff<Color=white> from the
gloom specialist.

Any more gloom, and I'd be canoeing down ol'
death river...
